artPrompt: A lean red devil performer arches backward mid-act, a great plume of hot-gold fire bursting from its open jaws toward the top of the frame, scaly arms thrown wide in reckless flourish, scarred chest lit orange against tattered carnival tents. Ember sparks swirl upward. The gesture is explosive, doomed bravado. Wide landscape, carnival red and hot gold washes bleeding into smoky black. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Fire-Eater of the Finale
text:
Haste
When Fire-Eater of the Finale enters the battlefield, hold your breath. While you are holding your breath (no cheating, the table is watching), this turn you may flip a coin any number of times. For each flip you win, it deals 2 damage to any target. The instant you breathe, the act is over.
flavorText: The grand finale lasts exactly as long as one lungful of bad ideas.

extras.physicalAction: hold your breath while flipping coins
